projectPilots.notes: First controlled project-sync pilot. Counts as one pilot only; it does not approve broad rollout.
Held because a pre-existing target-project formatting gate failed outside toolkit-managed files.

warningThresholds.requiredDecision: Owner must approve Level 4 WARN handling, accepted temporary exceptions, and fail/hold thresholds.

rollbackRehearsal.minimumRequired: Record at least one project update rollback rehearsal or equivalent revert drill before Level 4.

enterpriseToolMetadataReview.minimumRequired: Owner-reviewed enterprise metadata must exist for tools used or described as approved in Level 4.

promotionDecision.notes: Promotion requires evidence and owner approval. Intent, passing validators, or metadata-only records are not enough.
